meaning: n.圣经新约福音书的作者,福音传道者
examples: Be a tech ambassador, not an evangelist.
The evangelist — wants to spread an idea.
Mr Blair has been an evangelist on climate change.
"There was a Christian evangelist group that were involved with the local Tory party, " he says.
Ms Richards, a former "development evangelist" at SendGrid, has also now lost her job.
